overview: Bio-Identical Pellet Hormone Therapy specializes in testosterone and estrogen pellet therapy for hormone imbalance. The clinic combines comprehensive lab testing and personalized consultation with subcutaneous pellet placement to deliver consistent hormone levels over several months.
highlights: Comprehensive lab testing and diagnostic evaluation
targetAudience: Adults experiencing hormonal imbalance symptoms, particularly those undergoing perimenopause, menopause, or andropause.
